summary: Completed testing of Admin Profile feature (iteration 29). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - Profile button in topbar opens 'Il Mio Profilo' dialog, tabs 'Dati Profilo' and 'Sicurezza' working, profile editing, password change, photo upload/remove all functional.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console) - same as iteration 28

critical_code_review_comments: Profile button in topbar (data-testid='profile-button') correctly opens 'Il Mio Profilo' dialog
Avatar with initials (FD for Francesco De Liso) visible in topbar and dialog
Dialog shows full name, email, and role badge (Super Admin/Admin)
Tab 'Dati Profilo': Nome, Cognome, Telefono fields are editable
Tab 'Dati Profilo': Email displayed but marked as non-editable with explanation text
Tab 'Dati Profilo': 'Nome visualizzato ai clienti' box shows first_name + last_name
Tab 'Sicurezza': Password change form with current, new, confirm fields
Tab 'Sicurezza': Password mismatch validation shows 'Le password non coincidono'
'Cambia Foto' button triggers hidden file input for image upload
'Rimuovi' button appears only when profile image exists and removes it
PUT /api/admin/profile correctly updates first_name, last_name, phone and auto-updates full_name
PUT /api/admin/change-password validates current password and minimum 8 chars for new password
POST /api/admin/upload-profile-image accepts images and stores as base64
Topbar updates immediately after profile changes (name and initials)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Profile feature fully functional. Profile dialog accessible via profile-button in topbar. Two tabs: 'Dati Profilo' (edit name, surname, phone) and 'Sicurezza' (change password). Photo upload/remove working. Email is read-only. 'Nome visualizzato ai clienti' shows combined first_name + last_name.

backend_api.PUT /api/admin/profile - all fields: ✓ Updates all fields and auto-updates full_name
backend_api.PUT /api/admin/profile - remove image: ✓ Setting profile_image to empty removes it
backend_api.PUT /api/admin/change-password - success: ✓ Changes password and allows login with new password
backend_api.POST /api/admin/upload-profile-image - s: ✓ Uploads image and returns base64 data URL
backend_api.GET /api/auth/me: ✓ Returns profile fields including first_name, last_name, profile_image

frontend_ui.Profile button in topbar: ✓ Clickable, shows avatar with initials + name + role badge
frontend_ui.Role badge: ✓ Shows 'Super Admin' badge with ShieldCheck icon
frontend_ui.Salva Modifiche button: ✓ Saves profile and shows success toast
frontend_ui.Password fields: ✓ Password Attuale, Nuova Password, Conferma Nuova Password
frontend_ui.Photo upload: ✓ Uploads image and shows success toast
frontend_ui.Rimuovi button: ✓ Appears after upload, removes image on click
frontend_ui.Topbar update: ✓ Name and initials update immediately after save
